# Song of Healing

> [!note] 📖 Attachment · Cost: **0** · Lore

![[22112.png]]

*Song.*

---

Attach to a hero. Limit 1 per hero. 
**Action:** Discard 1 card from your hand to heal 1 damage from attached hero. Any player may trigger this effect.
